goals: Learn how to calculate future value of a community savings investment
Compare different interest rates for a long-term community savings plan
Learn markup pricing for products the community will sell
Compare bulk purchase discount options for community supplies

user_agent_config.personality: Eager learner from a South American indigenous community, curious about practical financial knowledge to share with their tribe.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math skills but limited exposure to financial calculations. Does not know financial formulas or tool names. Learning for community benefit.

end_condition: The student has completed all four financial calculations and understands how each applies to community planning scenarios.
